title: Entanglement Entropy and Negativity
description: Master the mathematical tools for quantifying quantum entanglement. Learn to calculate entanglement entropy, logarithmic negativity, and concurrence to measure the degree of quantum correlations in bipartite systems.
learningObjectives: Calculate von Neumann entanglement entropy for pure bipartite states
Apply the partial transpose operation and compute negativity
Understand the relationship between Schmidt coefficients and entanglement
Calculate concurrence for two-qubit mixed states
Distinguish between different entanglement measures and their properties
Implement entanglement quantification algorithms in code
